about.title: About FutureUp Academy
about.subtitle: A modern education and capability-building organization preparing individuals and organizations for the future of work
about.storyText: We are a modern education and capability-building organization focused on preparing individuals and organizations for the future of work. Our mission is simple: to turn learning into real skills — and skills into real opportunities. We design and deliver practical, outcome-driven programs for students, professionals, and institutions, combining structured curriculum design with real-world applications. Every program we build is centered around measurable results, employability, and long-term impact.
about.missionText: We work across four core areas: higher education programs and student upskilling, professional reskilling and career acceleration, corporate learning and workforce development, and public-sector capacity building and employability initiatives. So learning doesn't stay theoretical — it becomes usable capability.
about.visionText: We believe effective education must be practical, not abstract; measurable, not symbolic; aligned with market needs; and built for long-term growth. That's why every program is designed around clear learning outcomes, real projects, and structured evaluation.
about.value1Desc: Delivered education and upskilling projects in collaboration with BP
about.value2Desc: Partnered with the Innovation and Digital Development Agency on capacity building
about.value3Desc: Implemented employability and reskilling initiatives for job seekers
about.value4Desc: Collaborated with multiple universities in Azerbaijan on education programs
about.value5Desc: Program design, training delivery, learner assessment, and skills development for diverse audiences
about.value6Desc: From learning to capability. From capability to opportunity. From today's skills to tomorrow's impact.
about.ctaTitle: We Exist to Help People Move Forward
about.ctaSubtitle: From learning to capability. From capability to opportunity. From today's skills to tomorrow's impact.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our academy
faq.a1: FutureUp Academy is Azerbaijan's leading IT education academy offering professional courses in programming, design, data analytics, and cybersecurity.
faq.a2: No! We offer courses for all levels — from complete beginners to advanced professionals.
faq.a3: Course duration varies from 3 to 6 months depending on the program.
faq.a4: Upon successful completion, you receive a FutureUp Academy certificate with a unique QR code that can be verified on our website.
faq.a5: We offer morning (10:00-13:00), evening (18:00-21:00), and weekend groups.
faq.a6: Course prices vary by program. Contact us for current pricing and available payment plans.
faq.q7: Do you offer job placement assistance?
faq.a7: Yes! We provide career support including resume reviews, interview preparation, and connections with our partner companies.
faq.a8: Course transfers are possible within the first 2 weeks of the program.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Contact us and we'll be happy to help
